{{Quote|Plan on joining the Rebellion? Got a grudge against the Empire? Want to fly with the BEST Fighter Group in the Alliance? If you answered YES to all 3 of these questions, then RED GROUP is for you! See your local recruiter NOW.|E-mail message from Rustyn Jarl|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance">''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''</ref>}}
'''Rustyn Jarl''' was member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and recruiter for a group of fighter pilots known as Red Group, shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. Jarl once sent out an e-mail message to Alliance members urging them to join Red Group.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1stm}}
